# karsartha-web

Public mirror of the Karsartha dashboard, served via GitHub Pages.

**Do not edit directly.** Files in this repo are auto-synced from the private source repo (`Marpale/Karsartha`) by the `publish-web` GitHub Action on each push to `master`.

## What's here

- `index.html` — static dashboard (vanilla JS, no build step).
- `entities.json` — verdict cards (one per case study).
- `letters.json` — Value Letter cards.

## Source

Analysis content (case studies, framework, raw data) lives in the private source repo. This repo is the **rendering layer only**.
